feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SOAP API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) did not return result or show error via postman
entry.content:
Hi

I am trying to implement the "Post Incoming Payment" functionality in the API, for which I found two main SOAP APIs related to this function, namely Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) and Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous).

Regarding the Post part, after referring to the examples, it quickly completed creation normally; I was able to create DZ and DR type Journal Entries successfully and find them in the system. However, when I tried to use the Clearing API, I used two matching DR and DZ documents. Postman only returned "202 Accepted" and there were no further return values.

From the documentation, I learned that SAP should return a Confirmation request to indicate the final execution result. I set up a WebHook to receive any possible return requests, but I did not receive any requests. Moreover, when I tried to look for the execution results of this request within the system, I couldn’t find any error messages or detailed information about the execution results in the SOAP Error Log or Message Monitoring application.

What I want to know is: how can I view these specific execution results (in the SAP system or through API returns)? Is there an error in my approach to using the Clearing interface?

entry.title: Professional services. Employee time with Sales price 0.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Our client use Professional services and Time and expenses contract type. Employees who participate in project input their hours and then they company bill them to client. We use project specific prices for each employee for each project (Manage Prices- sales, PCP0) y condition table 040

 

 

What we have noticed, and we would like to know if it’s a standard behavior when we have a Sales price 0, SAP includes this posting in Billing document and make a billing rate equal with cost rate.  For example:

 

For some of employee categories our client would like to see at the project costs but not income and also this costs shouldn’t generate revenue recognition. We saw that there is an option no mark this  person assignment as Non-billable. In this case SAP doesn't create Revenue recognition posting. 

The problem is that when we already have actual costs (time recorder), we can not switch from billable to non-billable element.  

The only thing that occurred to us, it’s a create an additional WBS  element  for this employees  and mark them there as non-billable. 

We don’t think it’s the best solution and really hope that SAP has for this case better options.

Does anybody had a similar situation?  Any solutions?

Thank you,

entry.title: System not allowing to change Supplier number/code after creation of PO
entry.content:
How to change vendor or Supplier Number/code after creation of PO?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: API for Settlement rule creation in WBS Element
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there a standard API to create the settlement rule in WBS element by mass upload. 

Best Regards,

Channa

entry.title: Custom condition type is not visible in PO - Landed Costs
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have set up custom condition type for Custom Duty, so it can be added to the material price ( customer is using moving average),  i have set up calculation schema for purchasing, I have used existing Account key ( as i cant set up new one), it seems that I have done what needed to be done but condition is still not visible in the PO line items, so potentially I am missing something but cant workout what exactly is missing. Can someone please help?

 

Thanks

Barbara

entry.title: Assigning Managers to Workers with Different Company Codes in Work Agreement Field "Manager"
entry.content:
We recently had the following question: "How to assign Managers outside of your Company Code? As whenever I click on the Manager field, only the Managers from the same Company Code are visible."


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Implementing nested line items in a Fiori application using RAP.
entry.content:
Hello expert,

We are developing a custom Fiori application for SAP Public Cloud. The requirement is to generate a nested line item at runtime. Based on the user's input number, the corresponding sub-line items should be dynamically displayed on the same screen.

Does anyone have an idea about how to develop this type of requirement or implementation ?

entry.title: Automatic PO not created in S/4 HANA Public Cloud after Send price to external system from Ariba Sou
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are currently facing the following issue:

After sending the awarded supplier quotation from Ariba Sourcing to the external system (S/4HANA Public Cloud), the purchase order is not being created automatically. The quotation is successfully transmitted and is visible in the RFQ within S/4HANA, but the expected automatic PO creation is not taking place.

Kindly share your suggestions.

Thanks and regards,

Shubham B

entry.title: Single Warehouse Order needs to be created for multiple deliveries with single line item.
entry.content:
Requirement is to create Single Warehouse Order for multiple deliveries with single line item. Can this be achieved in Standard SAP EWM? If so, kindly provide the possible configuration and steps to execute with the Basic EWM system configuration.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Technical Error when calling Project Element Badi
entry.content: When we change the Project Manager of a specific Project ID, we encounter the error Technical Error when Calling Project Element Badi. Can you please advise how to troubleshoot such issue?

entry.title: SearchHelp - Public Cloud Generate UI Service Table
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a custom table in a Public Cloud system.

I have some fields defined with custom domains and fixed values ​​and others defined with standard data elements (such as BUKRS or FAKT).

I published the view with Eclipse using the automatic procedure "Generate Abap Repository object". Tutorial here: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-rap100-generate-ui-service..html

When I launch the published service the fields linked to custom domains with fixed values ​​do not show an automatic searchhelp, the field is a normal text field without the possibility of seeing the list of declared fixed values.

Example fields with Fix Doman Value:

 

The same problems with BUKRS or FAKT data elements. In Bukrs case; I modified the Metadata Extension generated by the tool to insert the SearchHelp:

BUKRS I added this annotation:

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [ { entity: { name: 'I_CompanyCodeStdVH', element: 'CompanyCode' } }

But to find "I_CompanyCodeStdVH" isn't easy!

What is the correct or fastest way to:

a) determine the search-help values ​​linked to the standard data elements (usable and released for client use)? Is there a library with all the values ​​cataloged?

b) Is it not possible to use the automatic searchhelp of the fixed domain values? Should a particular annotation be added in the metadata Extension?

Thanks you

entry.title: Payment Medium Format - Data Source in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

in the attached file you can see a payment medium of a US customer. Their bank requires certain information in the ID section of the payment medium. It is possible to set one ID for both fields, using the 'customer number' in house bank settings. But to only have one ID for both fields and not two different IDs for each of them is not sufficient to the bank's requirements.

How is it possible to set two seperate IDs. Which field in the system controls the field in the payment medium? What can I do in Public Cloud?

Thank you for your help!

BR

Jan-Niklas

entry.title: Add header text to uploading budget template PSM
entry.content:
I’m reaching out for assistance with an issue we’re facing in our SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud environment (Public Sector scope).

We’re currently uploading budgets for specific cost centers using the “Public Sector: Run Application Job” functionality. The job runs successfully and the budget documents appear in the “Manage Budget Documents” app. However, when we go to the Manage Budget Documents app, we see that the document description in the header is always set to “Generated Automatically” (see attached screenshot). We would like to add our own description during the upload (For example: Budget round June 2025), so that the documents are easier to recognize afterwards. 

 

So far, I’ve tried the following:

 

  1. Adding a custom column in the upload template → either ignored or causes an error
  1. Renaming the job title → only shows in the job log, not as the document header text
  1. Creating budget documents manually via the app → works, but not feasible for bulk uploads
  1. Looking into APIs or extensibility options → seems overly complex or unavailable in standard public cloud

 

My questions:

 

  1. Is there a standard way to include a document header text when uploading budgets via the application job?
  1. If so, how can this be configured or enabled?
  1. If not, what would be the best alternative to ensure uploaded documents are easily distinguishable?

 

Looking forward to your guidance.

entry.title: Request for setting default field value in purchase orders
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are working in the S4/HANA Public Cloud environment and would like to configure default values for specific fields when creating a purchase order (PO). We are specifically looking to prefill fields such as:

- Company code 

- Purchasing group 

We have already reviewed the options under Set User Defaults, but these fields are either unavailable there or not taking effect during PO creation. For instance, i filled in "001" as default value for Purchasing group without any result.

Could you please advise us:

1. Whether it's possible to achieve this through configuration or user personalization in Public Cloud?

2. If not, what is the recommended way to set such default fields?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Bank Statement MT940
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I would like to know if the MT940 format supports client accounts.

I checked the Make Global Settings for Electronic Bank; the system fixed to GL account "++++++++30"

I need to design GL account bank as follow:

Sample GL Account code

1000001  Bank Balance

1000002 Bank incoming (Use the account code for post incoming payment)

1000003 Bank outgoing (Use the account code for post outgoing payment)

Sample Transaction(Incoming Payment)

Dr. 1000002 Bank incoming 

       Cr. AR

Sample Import Bank Statement (Manage Incoming Payment Files):

Dr. 1000001  Bank Balance

    Cr. ++++++++90 (Technical Account)

Dr. ++++++++30 (Other Bank Transfer)

    Cr. ++++++++90 (Technical Account)

The account code 1000002 Bank incoming not clear to zero.

Please advise and confirm GL Account code for setting in make global. 

Thanks,

Chanaporn S.

entry.title: 公有云系统中，量差与价差的核算未能分别体现，全部核算到价差中，没有体现量差，如何处置？
entry.content: 公有云系统中，量差与价差的核算未能分别体现，全部核算到价差中，没有体现量差，如何处置？

entry.title: How to Resolve Issues Transporting Flavors - S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
I am working with S/4HANA public cloud edition 2502, and attempting to use the "post goods receipt" application to create a flavor for our end users.

After doing the work to the flavor in the development system, I have created the assignment category for the flavor and completed the export collection/import collection process to move changes from the development system to the test system.

However, when launching the flavor in the test system, there are several fields missing from the adapted screen.

How can this be solved in the public cloud? I only have access to the "manage flavors" application, but I don't see any options in that application for troubleshooting.

entry.title: Sending order confirmation with attachments via email in sales order in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We currently have the requirement that in the S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition, when an order confirmation for a sales order is sent by e-mail, attachments such as the general terms and conditions and the cancellation policy should also be sent together with the order confirmation. Is there an option for this in the S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition? If not, do you have any workarounds that we could use for this?

Best Regards,

Omid

entry.title: Currency conversion insufficient privilege
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Maybe I'm doing something wrong, but I am at a total loss currently. I have a TEST space and a PROD space and a SAP space. In the SAP space I have my currency conversion objects, which I have shared with both the TEST and PROD space using the currency conversion views creator built into SAP Datasphere. I have also created the currency conversion views from the SAP space in the TEST space and put them in a package that I import in the PROD space.

In the screenshots below you can see how I shared the currency conversion tables with the other space

And this is how I created the views from the SAP space in the TEST space.

Everything works as it should in the TEST space, but when I import all of my packages into the PROD space, I get a insufficient privilege error. I can fix this by basically deleting the currency conversion columns and creating them again, but if I import the package again because of changes in the TEST space, I have to do this all over again. So this isn't a long term solution.

Does anyone maybe know what I am doing wrong or how I can make sure the currency conversion doesnt break when I transport objects between spaces.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - Creation of problem-solving process failed (error code: 401 Unauthorized)
entry.content: From the Change Notification application (QM02) we clicked on "Start problem solving" from the action box and saving we get the attached error
